COVSTART 
LABEL: 
Medicare Coverage Start Date 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date when the beneficiary first became eligible for Medicare coverage (Part A or 
Part B). 
SHORT NAME: COVSTART 
LONG NAME: COVSTART 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Historic date of first Medicare coverage (may be prior
